messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0111",
  "title": "图表描述：",
  "page_index": 33,
  "page_range": "33"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0112",
    "title": "1. **图表类型**：",
    "page_range": "33",
    "summary": "This section identifies the figure as a line chart and defines its primary purpose: visualizing data trends over time. It can answer questions regarding chart classification, the specific function of line charts, and how temporal data is represented. No specific dates, procedures, metrics, tables, or additional evidence types are provided."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0113",
    "title": "2. **图例说明**：",
    "page_range": "33-32",
    "summary": "This section answers questions about chart interpretation and data scope by providing a figure legend. It defines:\n- **Entities & Metrics:** The specific server regions tracked (国服, 繁中服, 日服) and their combined total (三服合计).\n- **Definitions & Visual Mapping:** The exact meaning of each chart element (cyan-green area = aggregate total; blue line = Chinese server; yellow line = Traditional Chinese server; orange line = Japanese server).\n- **Data Constraints:** Clarifies that the Chinese server metric is restricted exclusively to App Store data.\n- **Evidence Type:** Serves as a reference key for interpreting a multi-series line/area chart tracking regional server metrics.\nEnables precise retrieval of visual encoding rules, server categorization, and platform-specific data boundaries."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0114",
    "title": "3. **数据趋势分析**：",
    "page_range": "32",
    "summary": "**Topic:** Data trend analysis for game server performance metrics.\n**Entities:** 三服合计 (Total of three servers), 国服（仅App Store）, 繁中服, 日服.\n**Dates/Timeframes:** Mid-July (universal peak), late December (year-end low), pre-mid-July baseline period.\n**Metrics & Values:** Approximate peak values (~1,600, ~800, ~400, ~400) and year-end values (~200, ~100, ~100, ~50) per entity; relative volatility levels (low vs. high).\n**Claims:** All server metrics peaked in mid-July and declined steadily through late December; 三服合计 drives the aggregate trend; 繁中服 exhibits the highest individual volatility; 国服 and 日服 show minor post-peak increases with consistently low volatility.\n**Evidence/Figure Type:** Analysis of a color-coded line and area chart (teal area for total; blue, yellow, and orange lines for individual servers).\n**Answerable Questions:** When did server metrics peak and decline? What are the approximate peak and year-end values for each server? Which server shows the highest/lowest values or volatility? How do individual server trends compare to the combined total? What is the pre- vs. post-July trend pattern for each metric?"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0115",
    "title": "4. **关键时间节点**：",
    "page_range": "32",
    "summary": "This section addresses questions regarding key temporal milestones and directional trends in categorical data metrics. It identifies mid-July as the peak date for all data categories, with specific emphasis on the entities “三服合计” (three-server total) and “繁中服” (Traditional Chinese server). It identifies late December as the date when all categories reached their lowest point, supporting the claim of an overall downward trend. The content can answer queries about specific dates of metric peaks and troughs, category-specific performance highlights, and the general trend direction. Evidence is based on time-series observations of unspecified data metrics. No definitions, procedures, tables, or figures are included."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0116",
    "title": "5. **总结**：",
    "page_range": "32-1",
    "summary": "This section provides a data summary of regional server performance trends, enabling retrieval for questions regarding:\n- **Topics & Entities:** Performance comparisons across “三服合计” (combined three servers), “国服（仅App Store）” (CN App Store server), “日服” (JP server), and “繁中服” (Traditional Chinese server).\n- **Dates & Timeframes:** Mid-July (peak period) and late December (lowest point).\n- **Claims & Trends:** Combined server data peaked in mid-July before steadily declining to a year-end low. CN and JP servers maintain relatively low values with minimal fluctuation, while the Traditional Chinese server exhibits high volatility. All categories reached their lowest point in late December, confirming a consistent overall downward trend.\n- **Figures & Evidence:** Summarizes an accompanying chart/figure; evidence is proprietary research and data visualization by 点点数据 (DianDian Data).\n- **Metrics:** Tracks numerical values and volatility/fluctuation patterns across server regions (specific metric name not explicitly stated in the text)."
  }
]

message.content: This section provides a comprehensive description and analysis of a multi-series line/area chart tracking regional game server performance metrics. Topics cover chart classification, visual encoding rules, temporal trend analysis, and server performance comparisons. Entities include 三服合计 (combined three-server total), 国服（仅App Store）(Chinese server, App Store data only), 繁中服 (Traditional Chinese server), and 日服 (Japanese server). Dates/Timeframes highlight mid-July as the universal peak period and late December as the year-end trough, with a pre-mid-July baseline. Figures & Definitions detail a color-coded line/area chart: a cyan-green area represents the aggregate total, while blue, yellow, and orange lines correspond to the CN, TW, and JP servers, respectively. Metrics track numerical performance values and volatility, with approximate peak values of ~1,600 (total), ~800 (CN), ~400 (TW), and ~400 (JP), declining to year-end lows of ~200, ~100, ~100, and ~50. Claims state that all metrics peaked in mid-July and steadily declined through late December; the combined total drives the aggregate trend, the TW server shows the highest volatility, and the CN/JP servers maintain low volatility with minor post-peak increases. Evidence Type consists of proprietary time-series data visualization and research by 点点数据 (DianDian Data). This content enables precise retrieval for queries regarding chart interpretation, platform-specific data constraints, temporal milestones, metric valuations, volatility rankings, and overall trend direction.

response_text: This section provides a comprehensive description and analysis of a multi-series line/area chart tracking regional game server performance metrics. Topics cover chart classification, visual encoding rules, temporal trend analysis, and server performance comparisons. Entities include 三服合计 (combined three-server total), 国服（仅App Store）(Chinese server, App Store data only), 繁中服 (Traditional Chinese server), and 日服 (Japanese server). Dates/Timeframes highlight mid-July as the universal peak period and late December as the year-end trough, with a pre-mid-July baseline. Figures & Definitions detail a color-coded line/area chart: a cyan-green area represents the aggregate total, while blue, yellow, and orange lines correspond to the CN, TW, and JP servers, respectively. Metrics track numerical performance values and volatility, with approximate peak values of ~1,600 (total), ~800 (CN), ~400 (TW), and ~400 (JP), declining to year-end lows of ~200, ~100, ~100, and ~50. Claims state that all metrics peaked in mid-July and steadily declined through late December; the combined total drives the aggregate trend, the TW server shows the highest volatility, and the CN/JP servers maintain low volatility with minor post-peak increases. Evidence Type consists of proprietary time-series data visualization and research by 点点数据 (DianDian Data). This content enables precise retrieval for queries regarding chart interpretation, platform-specific data constraints, temporal milestones, metric valuations, volatility rankings, and overall trend direction.
